en: This is created from a witch's brew: Cures one of poisonous diseases. To use it, one should have a 45 in Forensics and a 40 in Necromancy.

This is created from a witch's brew: Marks a rune location with symbols of evil, so you can use recalling magic on it to return to that location. To use it, one should have a 75 in Forensics and a 70 in Necromancy.
Xtee Mee Glau
This is created from druidic herbalism: Heals the target of all ailments. To use it, one should have a 45 in Druidism and a 40 in Veterinary.
This is created from a witch's brew: Causes one to suffer from a poisonous disease. To use it, one should have a 20 in Forensics and a 15 in Necromancy.
This is created from druidic herbalism: Causes a wall of foliage to grow, blocking the way of others. To use it, one should have a 20 in Druidism and a 15 in Veterinary.
This is created from druidic herbalism: Causes molten lava to burst from the ground, hitting every foe nearby. To use it, one should have a 80 in Druidism and a 75 in Veterinary.
This is created from a witch's brew: Ignites a marked rune with power to transport one to that location. To use it, one should have a 65 in Forensics and a 60 in Necromancy.
This is created from a witch's brew: Creates a protective wall of spikes. To use it, one should have a 40 in Forensics and a 35 in Necromancy.
This is created from a witch's brew: Absorbs mana from the target, giving it to you in return. To use it, one should have a 35 in Forensics and a 30 in Necromancy.
This is created from a witch's brew: Creates an illusionary image of you, distracting your foes. To use it, one should have a 70 in Forensics and a 65 in Necromancy.
This is created from a witch's brew: Takes some of your life and bestows it upon another. To use it, one should have a 50 in Forensics and a 45 in Necromancy.
This is created from a witch's brew: Gives one the same sight of the undead, where they are able to see in the dark. To use it, one should have a 10 in Forensics and a 5 in Necromancy.
This is created from druidic herbalism: Releases a swarm of insects from the jar that bite and sting nearby foes. To use it, one should have a 65 in Druidism and a 60 in Veterinary.
This is created from druidic herbalism: Dumps out a magical stone that draws all nearby animals to it. To use it, one should have a 10 in Druidism and a 5 in Veterinary.

This is created from druidic herbalism: using a magical rune, this liquid causes magical mushrooms to grow a portal to the runic location. To use it, one should have a 60 in Druidism and a 55 in Veterinary.
This is created from druidic herbalism: Causes a living tree to grow and wander along with the you. To use it, one should have a 75 in Druidism and a 70 in Veterinary.

This is created from a witch's brew: Uses a magic rune to create a horrific black gate. Those that enter will appear at the runic location. To use it, one should have a 80 in Forensics and a 75 in Necromancy.
This is created from druidic herbalism: Releases fireflies to distract a foe from battle. To use it, one should have a 55 in Druidism and a 50 in Veterinary.
This is created from a witch's brew: Turns your body into ghostly matter that reappears in a nearby location. To use it, one should have a 60 in Forensics and a 55 in Necromancy.

This is created from druidic herbalism: Marks a magic rune with your location, that you can use recalling magics to transport to later. To use it, one should have a 40 in Druidism and a 35 in Veterinary.
This is created from druidic herbalism: Turns one into flower petals and carries them on the wind to a magic rune location. To use it, one should have a 15 in Druidism and a 10 in Veterinary.
This is created from a witch's brew: Turns the body into an invisible ghostly form that cannot be seen. To use it, one should have a 55 in Forensics and a 50 in Necromancy.
This is created from druidic herbalism: Allows one to blend seamlessly with the forest, causing foes to lose sight of them. To use it, one should have a 50 in Druidism and a 45 in Veterinary.
This is created from druidic herbalism: Increases your protection by making your skin like bark from an ancient tree. To use it, one should have a 25 in Druidism and a 20 in Veterinary.
Anh Mi Sah Ko
This is created from druidic herbalism: Releases roots from the ground to entangle a foe. To use it, one should have a 35 in Druidism and a 30 in Veterinary.
This is created from a witch's brew: Creates a burst of harmful gas. To use it, one should have a 30 in Forensics and a 25 in Necromancy.

This is created from a witch's brew: Dumps vampire blood in your pack, that will resurrect you a few moments after losing your life. You can also directly resurrect others. To use it, one should have a 85 in Forensics and a 80 in Necromancy.
This is created from a witch's brew: Summons a spirit to disable a trap. To use it, one should have a 25 in Forensics and a 20 in Necromancy.
This is created from druidic herbalism: Releases a fairy from the jar to a help the adventurer on their journey. To use it, one should have a 70 in Druidism and a 65 in Veterinary.

This is created from druidic herbalism: Dumps mystical mud in your pack, that will resurrect you a few moments after losing your life. You can also directly resurrect others. To use it, one should have a 85 in Druidism and a 80 in Veterinary.
This is created from druidic herbalism: Causes stones to push up from the ground, trapping your foes. To use it, one should have a 30 in Druidism and a 25 in Veterinary.
This is created from a witch's brew: Summons the spirits to unlock something for you. To use it, one should have a 15 in Forensics and a 10 in Necromancy.
In Vas Mani
